title: Ring ni Kakero 1 Episode: The Pacific War
titleEnglish: Ring ni Kakero 1 Episode: The Pacific War
titleNative: リングにかけろ1 日米決戦編
synonyms: Put it All in the Ring 1: Japan vs USA Battle Story
Ring ni Kakero: US VS JAPAN
synopsis: Immediately after Ryuuji Takane won the Champion Carnival, the U.S. Junior Champion Black Shaft appeared, and challenged the best Japan has to offer, just before the World Tournament is about to happen. Now Ryuuji, Takeshi Kawai, Kazuki Shinatora, Ishimatsu Katori, and Superstar Jun Kenzaki have to prove to not only Black Shaft, but the world, that they are truly world-class boxers before the World Tournament starts. But Shaft is not recruiting boxers for his challenge, but instead gets a life-timer criminal from Death Row, the leader of the Great Angels, one of the toughest gangs in America, a mysterious woman, and the "Dark Emperor of the South". Also, Shaft negotiates with Don Giuliano, the Italian Junior Champion, just in case... (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Taro's Train
synopsis: A combination of live action, traditional animation, and stop motion animation. A father buys his son a toy train, which he loves. When the boy goes to sleep, the train comes to life and crawls into the bed with the boy, giving him a dream about proper train etiquette.

title: Xing Yu Siwan Nian
synopsis: It tells the story of a future sci-fi cultivation world where the weapon-refining genius Li Yao has been unable to break through the bottleneck due to his low spiritual development. Then, by chance, he obtained 40,000 years of cultivation knowledge. As a result, he cheated and still missed the joint entrance examination. With the encouragement of friends and mentors, he relied on his own willpower to regain the opportunity to participate in the joint entrance examination and finally entered the university of his choice, stepping into the story of realizing his dream of becoming a weapon refiner. (Source: Tencent Video, Edited)

title: Satsujin Kippu wa Heart-iro
synopsis: A detective story about a murder on a train based on a series of young-adult novels for women by Hiroyasu Yamaura. While suspended from school after beating up the seniors who bullied her best friend, Seiko goes for a trip to Nagasaki, where she finds herself involved in a murder mystery. (Source: Shoujo & General Weblog)

title: Genesis Climber Mospeada: Love, Live, Alive
titleRomaji: Genesis Climber Mospeada: Love, Live, Alive
titleEnglish: Genesis Climber Mospeada: Love, Live, Alive
titleNative: 機甲創世記モスピーダ Love
synopsis: After the original run of the television series, an OAV music video titled Genesis Climber Mospeada: Love Live Alive was specially (mostly due to demands of hardcore Mospeada fans) released in Japan in September 1985. The music video consisted of both old and new footage. The story of Love Live Alive chronicled the events after the ending of the original Mospeada, featuring Yellow Belmont as the main character. The music video focused on Yellow's concert and also on his flashback of past events. (Source: Wikipedia)

title: Monster Strike 2: A Rhapsody Called Lucy -The Very First Song-
titleRomaji: Monster Strike 2: Senritsu no Lucifer, Tada Hitotsu no Hajimari no Uta
titleEnglish: Monster Strike 2: A Rhapsody Called Lucy -The Very First Song-
titleNative: モンストアニメ GWスペシャル番外編「センリツのルシファー ただひとつの始まりの歌」
synonyms: Zenritsu no Lucifer: Tada Hitotsu no Hajimari no Uta
synopsis: Monster Strike 2 special episode for Golden Week 2017. "Change the world with music? Foolish." Lucy's world stops after her band disbands. Meaningless days pass, until she meets her cousin Lucifer and his bandmate Ibaraki Doji. They ask her to join their indie band, the "Wicked Pistols". Lucifer talks about his dream of going major after winning the MONSTERS ROCK competition, only for Lucy to reject him outright. However, Lucy's heart begins to thaw after a certain event... (Source: XFLAG via ANN)

title: Purple River
synopsis: Two hundred years ago, on the Battlefield of the Blue River, the last remaining army of the Empire of Light collapsed in the midst of demonic outcries. As the last Field Marshal and Emperor fell, the chaotic world of the Western River no longer had a common ruler. Factions were formed and endless conflicts ensued, military might became the only currency of survival, and the dream to reunite the lands became the sole goal of many rulers in the generations that came after. In the south-eastern part of the land, a powerful faction with over two hundred years of history – House Zichuan – fought off the Demons to the east, defended against the House Liufeng to the west, and contained the House Lin to the south. In order to accomplish their great ambitions and extend the bloodline of their family, countless heroes of Zichuan gave their lives in order to make this magnificent hymn come to life. This is a story about this legendary family and a hundred years of their blood and tears.

title: Isekai Tensei Soudouki
synopsis: Bard Cornelius: the son of a nobleman of Mauricia, an empire located in a parallel universe. But Bard is no ordinary boy―he's got three souls packed into one body! Aside from his own consciousness, he's got Oka Sanai, a miserly samurai, and Masaharu Oka, a high school otaku who loves animal ears. With his extra knowledge of military tactics and business acumen, Bard's ready to cheat his way to the top! (Source: One Peace Books)
